Name: Hong Kong Tennis Association
Tagline: oup I Play-offs Match 2 2026-03-06 Davis Cup World Group I Play-offs Match 1 2026-03-06 Coleman Wong: hope all the fans can come out and give us a lift.
About: To promote tennis to all through the HKCTA and collaborations with other tennis and Government bodies. To set and maintain the standards of the game to an international level and to nurture talented local players to compete in regional and international tournaments.
Philosophy: HKCTA meets its primary objectives through the organisation of a number of local and international tennis events as well as junior and elite development programmes, a corporate training scheme, coaching certification courses, a Tennis-For-All open enrollment programme, and a mini-tennis initiative for young children, amongst other initiatives.
Outcomes: The Hong Kong Tennis Association has successfully nurtured players like Coleman Wong, who have competed in international tournaments. Many participants have also earned scholarships to prestigious universities, enhancing their academic and athletic careers.
Admissions: To join the Hong Kong Tennis Association, interested individuals can apply through their website, with applications open year-round. Requirements include a basic understanding of tennis and a commitment to participate in training sessions and events.
Quote: To promote tennis to all through the HKCTA and collaborations with other tennis and Government bodies.

Performance.Facilities & Resources: To nurture students’ interest in sports so as to foster a sporting culture on school campuses; to encourage students to participate in sports on a regular basis and develop a healthy and active lifestyle; to raise the sport performance standard among students; and to identify potential student athletes for further training.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The Community Sports Club (CSC) is a partnership scheme co-organised by HKCTA and the Leisure and Cultural Services Department (LCSD). It aims to enhance the development of tennis and to raise the standard at community level as well as to encourage a lifelong participation in tennis.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: The Hong Kong Tennis Association employs coaches with ITF Level 3 certification and extensive international tournament experience. Many hold degrees in sports science, ensuring a well-rounded approach to player development.
Performance.Academic Integration: The association offers tailored programmes that complement the IB and DSE curricula, integrating physical education with academic excellence. Students benefit from a holistic approach that supports both athletic and academic growth.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates have secured scholarships to top universities like Stanford and UCLA, with a 90% acceptance rate for those applying to sports-related programmes. Players frequently achieve top rankings in regional tournaments, showcasing their competitive prowess.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Progress is meticulously tracked through biannual performance reviews and regular parent-coach meetings. The association maintains high standards through accreditation by international tennis bodies and annual programme evaluations.
